name: script-blocker-per-domain
description: Chrome extension (MV3) to block specific JavaScript files per domain via configurable URL patterns.

scripts.lint: node --check background.js && node --check popup.js && node --check options.js && echo 'Syntax OK'
scripts.check: npm run validate:manifest && npm run lint
scripts.build:zip: rm -f script-blocker.zip && zip -r script-blocker.zip manifest.json background.js popup.html popup.js options.html options.js icons/ -x '*.DS_Store'
scripts.build:store-zip: rm -f script-blocker-store.zip && zip -r script-blocker-store.zip manifest.json background.js popup.html popup.js options.html options.js icons/ -x '*.DS_Store'
